title: evolvulus kramerioides
intro: Evolvulus kramerioides, also known as blue daze, is a flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus kramerioides include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Evolvulus kramerioides is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal remedies, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
